TH_RIN-STRIKE.title: Strike
TH_RIN-DEFEND.title: Defend
TH_RIN-GHOST_FIRE.title: Ghost Fire
TH_RIN-GHOST_FIRE.description:
Create {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wraith(s)[/gold].
When drawn, apply [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold] +1 to a random enemy.
TH_RIN-WRAITH_FIRE.title: Wraith Fire
TH_RIN-WRAITH_FIRE.description:
Create {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wraith(s)[/gold].
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
When drawn, apply [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold] obtained this combat to all enemies.
TH_RIN-SOUL_CAT_FOOT.title: Cat Sign「Wraith Cat Random Walk」
TH_RIN-SOUL_CAT_FOOT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Each time you play a card this turn, create 1 [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-CAT_FOOT.title: Cat Random Walk
TH_RIN-CAT_FOOT.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), then set the cost of those cards to 0 this turn.
TH_RIN-CLEAN_TABLE.title: Table Clean
TH_RIN-CLEAN_TABLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Discard all cards in your hand. For each card discarded, increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_RIN-FIRE_WHEEL.title: Yokai「Wheel of Fire」
TH_RIN-FIRE_WHEEL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_RIN-CAT_CAR_COLLISION.title: Cat Car Crash
TH_RIN-CAT_CAR_COLLISION.description:
Deal damage equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold] to all enemies.
At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current [gold]Block[/gold], then lose all your [gold]Block[/gold].
If you played a card with the same name this turn, you do not lose [gold]Block[/gold] and instead gain the previously lost [gold]Block[/gold] first.
TH_RIN-SPLEEN_EATER.title: Hatred「Spleen Eater」
TH_RIN-SPLEEN_EATER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [gold]Wraith[/gold] or dealt unblocked damage, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold].
TH_RIN-FAST_CLAW.title: Fast Claw
TH_RIN-SHARPEN_CLAW.title: Sharpen Claws
TH_RIN-SHARPEN_CLAW.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
All cards with "Claw" in their name deal {Cards:diff()} more damage.
TH_RIN-CAT_SLEEP.title: Catnap
TH_RIN-CAT_SLEEP.description: At the start of your next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_RIN-VIGOR_BURST.title: Vigor Burst
TH_RIN-VIGOR_BURST.description:
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
At the start of your next {Cards:diff()} turn(s), gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_RIN-CUTE.title: Play Cute
TH_RIN-CUTE.description: If you have not played any [gold]Attack[/gold] cards this turn, make all enemies lose {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn and apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
TH_RIN-CAT_TONGUE.title: Cat Tongue
TH_RIN-CAT_TONGUE.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s), discard those with the [gold]Ignite[/gold] keyword and apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_RIN-CAT_DRUNK.title: Drunken Cat Step
TH_RIN-CAT_DRUNK.description: Randomly play X cards from your draw pile.
TH_RIN-HUMAN_SOUL_LANTERN.title: Human Soul Lantern
TH_RIN-HUMAN_SOUL_LANTERN.description: If you have a [gold]Wraith[/gold], consume 1 and make an enemy lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}; otherwise, create {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wraith(s)[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_RIN-FIRE_ROUND.title: Flame Wheel Protection
TH_RIN-FIRE_ROUND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When attacked this turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to the attacker.
TH_RIN-WIND_FIRE.title: Wind Fans Fire
TH_RIN-REFIRE.title: Resurgence
TH_RIN-REFIRE.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
If the enemy has no [gold]Ignite[/gold], apply another {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_RIN-HOT_HELL.title: Burning Hell
TH_RIN-FIRE_CLAW.title: Fire Claw
TH_RIN-CHAOS_FIRE.title: Chaotic Fire
TH_RIN-SPARK.title: Spark Form
TH_RIN-SPARK.description: At the start of your turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to a random enemy, then increase this effect by that enemy's [gold]Ignite[/gold] stacks.
TH_RIN-NIDDLE_MOUNTAIN.title: Atonement「Needle Mountain of Former Hell」
TH_RIN-NIDDLE_MOUNTAIN.description: All enemies lose 1 HP once. For each stack of a debuff, the HP loss increases by 1. For each type of debuff, the effect triggers one additional time.
TH_RIN-NIDDLE_GHOST.title: Atonement「Needles of Old and Wraith of Pain」
TH_RIN-NIDDLE_GHOST.description: Make an enemy lose 7 HP. For each {IfUpgraded:show:stack|type} of debuff on the enemy, create 1 [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-FIRE_DANCE.title: Flame Dance
TH_RIN-FIRE_DANCE.description: Each time you draw or play a card with the [gold]Ignite[/gold] keyword this turn, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_RIN-GHOST_TOWN.title: Death Sign「Wraith Town」
TH_RIN-GHOST_TOWN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] {Cards:diff()} times.
Create 1 [gold]Wraith[/gold].
This card's [gold]Block[/gold] is increased by the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold].
TH_RIN-CORPSE_STREET.title: 「Corpse Bustling Street」
TH_RIN-CORPSE_STREET.description: Create [gold]Wraiths[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Corpses[/gold] in your cart.
TH_RIN-FIRE_ALL.title: Incinerate
TH_RIN-FIRE_ALL.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your hand. For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies, then add that many [gold]Burn[/gold] to your hand.
TH_RIN-DARK_CHIREIDEN.title: Dark Chireiden
TH_RIN-DARK_CHIREIDEN.description: Choose one of [gold]Golem Mastery{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold], [gold]Social Connections{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold], or [gold]Dark Psychology{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] and add it to your hand.
TH_RIN-KOISHI.title: Golem Mastery
TH_RIN-KOISHI.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] [gold]Power[/gold] cards in your hand into [gold]Rolling Stone[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold] cards into [gold]Primal Strength[/gold], and [gold]Attack[/gold] cards into [gold]Boulder[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:, and they cost 0 the first time played this turn|}.
TH_RIN-RIN_KON.title: Social Connections
TH_RIN-RIN_KON.description: If your [gold]Strength[/gold] is greater than the enemy's [gold]Strength[/gold], make the enemy lose the difference in [gold]Strength[/gold]; otherwise, you gain the difference in [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_RIN-SATORI.title: Dark Psychology
TH_RIN-SATORI.description:
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
If the enemy intends to block, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
If the enemy intends to do something else, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_RIN-HELL_CAR_CRASH.title: Hell Car Crash
TH_RIN-HELL_CAR_CRASH.description: Whenever you draw a card with non-zero energy cost, deal damage equal to its cost times {Cards:diff()} to all enemies.
TH_RIN-CORPSE_TICKET_SELLER.title: Corpse Tour Ticket Seller
TH_RIN-CORPSE_TICKET_SELLER.description: At the end of combat, gain [gold]Gold[/gold] equal to (number of [gold]Corpses[/gold] you have) × (number of enemies that died in this combat).
TH_RIN-CORPSE_TRAVEL.title: Corpse Tour
TH_RIN-CORPSE_TRAVEL.description:
Deal damage equal to the total number of [gold]Corpses[/gold] in your cart to all enemies.
[gold]Corpses[/gold] dropped by all enemies will no longer [green]rot[/green].
TH_RIN-SILVER_VINE_EHOMAKI.title: Silver Vine Ehomaki
TH_RIN-CAT_BEYOND_CORPSE.title: Cat Leap Over Corpse
TH_RIN-CAT_BEYOND_CORPSE.description: Choose any number of cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] other than [gold]Cat Leap Over Corpse[/gold] and return them to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
TH_RIN-CAT_BEYOND_CORPSE.selectionScreen: Choose any number of cards to return to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
TH_RIN-CHAOS_TRAIN.title: Ecstatic Chaotic Train
TH_RIN-CHAOS_TRAIN.description:
Gain [gold]Confusion[/gold].
At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
TH_RIN-DETECTIVE_ASSISTANT_CAT.title: Ultimate Detective's Assistant Cat
TH_RIN-DETECTIVE_ASSISTANT_CAT.descripti: At the start of your turn, choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add them to your hand; they cost 0 the first time played this turn.
TH_RIN-HOT_SPRING.title: Hot Spring Bath
TH_RIN-HOT_SPRING.description:
Heal HP equal to {Cards:diff()}% of your Max HP.
End your turn.
TH_RIN-UNCEASING_RESENTMENT.title: Unceasing Resentment
TH_RIN-TAIL_CHASING_CAT.title: Tail-Chasing Cat
TH_RIN-TAIL_CHASING_CAT.description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add [gold]Replay[/gold] {Cards:diff()} to all cards.
TH_RIN-SHADOW_FOLLOW.title: Shadow Follow
TH_RIN-SHADOW_FOLLOW.description: All cards you play this turn are played an additional time.
TH_RIN-CIRCLE.title: Cycle
TH_RIN-GHOST_MOVING_TECHNIQUE.title: Wraith Moving Technique
TH_RIN-GHOST_MOVING_TECHNIQUE.descriptio: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and return them to your hand.
TH_RIN-GHOST_MOVING_TECHNIQUE.selectionS: Choose cards to return to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
TH_RIN-CORPSE_LOVE.title: Corpse Love
TH_RIN-CORPSE_LOVE.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to an enemy.
If you have a [gold]Corpse[/gold], for the next {Cards:diff()} turns, [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] on that enemy are twice as effective.
TH_RIN-LYCORIS.title: Lycoris Blooms
TH_RIN-LYCORIS.description: Whenever you [gold]consume a Wraith[/gold], increase your Max HP by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_RIN-BONE_MUCH.title: Bone Pile
TH_RIN-BONE_MUCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Deal additional damage once for each [gold]Corpse[/gold].
TH_RIN-CALL_CAT.title: Call of the Cats
TH_RIN-CALL_CAT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Cards:diff()} times.
TH_RIN-DAWN.title: Dawn Approaches
TH_RIN-DAWN.description: At the start of your turn, trigger [gold]Ignite[/gold] an additional {Cards:diff()} times.
TH_RIN-WILDFIRE_IN_JULY.title: Wildfire in July
TH_RIN-LAZY_TIPS.title: Lazy Tips
TH_RIN-LAZY_TIPS.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and 1 [gold]Slow[/gold] to all enemies.
End your turn, then [gold]Retain[/gold] your {Energy:energyIcons()} and [gold]Hand[/gold] until next turn.
TH_RIN-EVIL_FIRE.title: Evil Flame
TH_RIN-INSTANT.title: Instinctual Impulse
TH_RIN-INSTANT.description: Reduce the cost of all [gold]Attack[/gold] cards in your hand by 1 for this combat.
TH_RIN-BAKING.title: Baking
TH_RIN-BAKING.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile and [gold]Transform[/gold] them into [gold]Cake[/gold].
TH_RIN-CAKE.title: Cake
TH_RIN-NUCLEAR_INCINERATOR.title: Nuclear Incinerator
TH_RIN-NUCLEAR_INCINERATOR.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and add a [gold]Burn[/gold] to your hand.
TH_RIN-CORPSE_PYRAMID.title: Corpse Pyramid Construction
TH_RIN-CORPSE_PYRAMID.description: Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies equal to the number of [gold]Corpses[/gold] you have.
TH_RIN-THIEF_CAT.title: Phantom Thief Cat
TH_RIN-THIEF_CAT.description:
At the end of combat, gain an extra card reward.
If it was an [red]Elite[/red] or [purple]Boss[/purple], also gain an extra [gold]Relic[/gold].
TH_RIN-BLAZING_SKY_LIGHT.title: Blazing Sky Light
TH_RIN-BLAZING_SKY_LIGHT.description:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your hand.
TH_RIN-NECROMANTIC_CAT_CAR.title: Necromantic Cat Car
TH_RIN-NECROMANTIC_CAT_CAR.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies, plus an additional {Cards:diff()} damage for each [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-NEMESIS.title: Nemesis
TH_RIN-NEMESIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For this combat, multiply damage you deal to this enemy by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_RIN-SOUL_FIRE_SPEED.title: Wraith Fire Acceleration
TH_RIN-SOUL_ALCHEMY.title: Soul Alchemy
TH_RIN-GRUDGE_ABSORPTION.title: Grudge Absorption
TH_RIN-GRUDGE_ABSORPTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For every 4 unblocked damage dealt, create 1 [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-VENGEFUL_SPIRIT.title: Vengeful Spirit
TH_RIN-VENGEFUL_SPIRIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
If you have a [gold]Wraith[/gold], deal additional damage equal to the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold].
TH_RIN-ZOMBIE_FAIRY.title: Curse「Zombie Fairy」
TH_RIN-SOUL_RELY_ON.title: Curse「Wraith Possession Fairy」
TH_RIN-SOUL_RELY_ON.description:
Create {Cards:diff()} [gold]Wraith(s)[/gold].
This turn, your [gold]Wraiths[/gold] can be affected by [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_RIN-DEVIL_SOUL_REBORN.title: Evil Soul Reborn
TH_RIN-MONOLITHIC_HATRED.title: Mountainous Hatred
TH_RIN-MONOLITHIC_HATRED.description:
Deal damage equal to the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold] you have.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold] you have.
TH_RIN-EVIL_INVADER.title: Evil Invasion
TH_RIN-EVIL_INVADER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have a [gold]Wraith[/gold], double this card's damage.
TH_RIN-PURIFYING_SPIRIT_FLAME.title: Purifying Spirit Flame
TH_RIN-PURIFYING_SPIRIT_FLAME.descriptio:
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to an enemy.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card. If the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is a [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold], apply an additional {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_RIN-BURY.title: Bury
TH_RIN-BURY.description: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] to play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. If the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is a [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold], gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_RIN-EXPLOSION_MAGIC.title: Explosion Magic
TH_RIN-EXPLOSION_MAGIC.description: At the end of your next {Cards:diff()} turn(s), deal {Power:diff()} damage to all enemies and apply the same amount of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_RIN-KNIFE_MOUTAIN_FIRE_SEA.title: Mountain of Knives, Sea of Fire
TH_RIN-KNIFE_MOUTAIN_FIRE_SEA.descriptio: All enemies lose {Cards:diff()} HP, then apply the same amount of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_RIN-HOT_WAVE.title: Heat Wave
TH_RIN-HOT_WAVE.description:
If the enemy has [gold]Ignite[/gold], it loses [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to its [gold]Ignite[/gold] stacks.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_RIN-FOCUS.title: Focus
TH_RIN-FOCUS.description:
Remove the enemy's [gold]Artifact[/gold] and all [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold].
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
TH_RIN-TEMPTATION.title: Temptation
TH_RIN-THREE_CAT_TIGER.title: Three Cats Make a Tiger
TH_RIN-THREE_CAT_TIGER.description: If you have no [gold]Strength[/gold], gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold]; otherwise, multiply your [gold]Strength[/gold] by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_RIN-TRUST.title: Trust
TH_RIN-TRUST.description:
If you have no [gold]Block[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
This card returns to your [gold]Hand[/gold] after being played.
TH_RIN-PHANTOM_BREATH_TECHNIQUE.title: Phantom Breath Technique
TH_RIN-SPREAD.title: Spread
TH_RIN-SPREAD.description: Apply all debuffs on this enemy to {IfUpgraded:show:all|other} enemies.
TH_RIN-POISED_TO_STRIKE.title: Poised to Strike
TH_RIN-POISED_TO_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever this card is [gold]Retained[/gold] in your hand, increase its damage by {Cards:diff()} for this combat.
TH_RIN-RESENTMENT_ERUPTS.title: Resentment Erupts
TH_RIN-RESENTMENT_ERUPTS.description: All enemies lose HP equal to the percentage of the number of [gold]Wraiths[/gold] you have.
TH_RIN-HELLISH_WRAITS_UNLEASHED.title: Hellish Wraith Rampage
TH_RIN-HELLISH_WRAITS_UNLEASHED.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies {Cards:diff()} times.
Deal additional damage once for each [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-ENERGETIC_CAT.title: Energetic Cat
TH_RIN-ENERGETIC_CAT.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
TH_RIN-MAIDEN_TRAINER.title: Maid Training
TH_RIN-MAIDEN_TRAINER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your draw pile.
TH_RIN-SILENT_TAILING.title: Silent Tailing
TH_RIN-SILENT_TAILING.description: If you have not played any [gold]Attack[/gold] cards this turn, multiply damage you deal next turn by {Cards:diff()}.
TH_RIN-BRAND.title: Brand of Vengeance
TH_RIN-BRAND.description: Whenever your [gold]Wraiths[/gold] cause an enemy to lose HP, apply that much [gold]Ignite[/gold] to it.
TH_RIN-ENDLESS_SUFFERING.title: Endless Suffering
TH_RIN-ENDLESS_SUFFERING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply [gold]Demise[/gold] equal to the unblocked damage dealt.
Shuffle a copy of this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you draw this card, create a [gold]Wraith[/gold].
TH_RIN-PURE.title: Pure
TH_RIN-PURE.description: Whenever you [gold]consume a Wraith[/gold], shuffle a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_RIN-TAKE_CHANCE.title: Seize the Chance
TH_RIN-TAKE_CHANCE.description: If you have played 3 or fewer cards this turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_RIN-OBSERVE.title: Observe to the Bone
TH_RIN-OBSERVE.description: If the enemy intends to attack, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]; otherwise, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
TH_RIN-FRENZIED_TEARING.title: Frenzied Tearing
TH_RIN-FRENZIED_TEARING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies {Cards:diff()} times.
TH_RIN-MARS_CAT.title: Mars Cat
TH_RIN-MARS_CAT.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Ignite[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_RIN-RIGHT_LEFT_CLAW.title: Left-Right Claw
TH_RIN-CONTINUOUS_CLAW.title: Continuous Claw
TH_RIN-CONTINUOUS_CLAW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the previous card you played was an [gold]Attack[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_RIN-SURFACE_QUENCHING.title: Surface Quenching
TH_RIN-SURFACE_QUENCHING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
When you deal damage this turn, apply an equal amount of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
TH_RIN-PRAIRIE_FIRE.title: Prairie Fire
TH_RIN-PRAIRIE_FIRE.description: Now, enemies with [gold]Ignite[/gold] will, at the end of the turn, give other enemies [gold]Ignite[/gold] equal to {Cards:diff()}% of their own [gold]Ignite[/gold] stacks.
TH_RIN-MD_FORM.title: Elder Form
TH_RIN-MD_FORM.description:
After being attacked, the damage you deal is doubled.
You will die directly after 3 turns.
TH_RIN-CAT_MEETING.title: Cat Meeting
TH_RIN-CAT_MEETING.description: All players gain a random card, and it costs 0 the first time played this turn.
TH_RIN-RISE_UP.title: Cheer Up
TH_RIN-RISE_UP.description: Other players draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_RIN-BETRAYAL.title: Treacherous Dead Cat
TH_RIN-BETRAYAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to another player.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_RIN-TEST_CORPSE.title: Test Corpse
TH_RIN-SLIME_CORPSE.title: Puddle of Slime
TH_RIN-SLIME_CORPSE.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_RIN-SHRINKER_BEETLE_CORPSE.title: Shrinker Beetle Corpse
TH_RIN-SHRINKER_BEETLE_CORPSE.descriptio:
At the start of combat, all enemies lose {HpLoss:diff()}% of their HP.
[green]Rot {Cards:diff()}[/green]
TH_RIN-VINE_SHAMBLER_CORPSE.title: Vine Shambler Husk
TH_RIN-CUBEX_CONSTRUCT_CORPSE.title: Cube Construct Remains
TH_RIN-CUBEX_CONSTRUCT_CORPSE.descriptio: At the start of combat, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
TH_RIN-NIBBIT_CORPSE.title: Nibbit Corpse
TH_RIN-NIBBIT_CORPSE.description:
At the start of combat, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[green]Rot {Cards:diff()}[/green]
TH_RIN-INKLET_CORPSE.title: Puddle of Inklet
TH_RIN-INKLET_CORPSE.description: At the start of combat, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Slippery[/gold].
TH_RIN-SLITHERING_STRANGLER_CORPSE.title: Slithering Strangler Corpse
TH_RIN-SLITHERING_STRANGLER_CORPSE.descr:
At the start of your turn, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy.
[green]Rot {Cards:diff()}[/green]
TH_RIN-SNAPPING_JAXFRUIT_CORPSE.title: Snapping Jaxfruit
TH_RIN-SNAPPING_JAXFRUIT_CORPSE.descript:
At the start of combat, [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
This [gold]Corpse[/gold]'s effect is not affected by [gold]Integrity[/gold].
[green]Rot {Cards:diff()}[/green]
TH_RIN-FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLER_CORPSE.title: Fuzzy Wurm Crawler Corpse
TH_RIN-FUZZY_WURM_CRAWLER_CORPSE.descrip:
At the end of your turn, if you have not played any [gold]Attack[/gold] cards, gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[green]Rot {Cards:diff()}[/green]
TH_RIN-MAWLER_CORPSE.title: Mawler Corpse
TH_RIN-MAWLER_CORPSE.description:
At the start of combat, apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
